decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_b44-sbs matches existing registry record route_b44-sbs exactly — same route variant (SBS), same corridor (Nostrand/Rogers/Bedford Aves, Brooklyn). The do_not_merge_pairs confirm route_b44-sbs is distinct from route_b44-local and route_b44-limited. The source 201011_nostrand_handout is already listed in route_b44-sbs source_ids. No different target record to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ▪ B44 SBS replaces the B44 Limited ▪ B44 local route remains the same ▪ Northbound SBS will travel on Rogers instead of New York Ave, for faster and more direct service ▪ SBS fare = local bus fare

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_b44-local matches existing registry record route_b44-local exactly — same service variant (local), same corridor (Nostrand/Rogers/Bedford Aves, Brooklyn). The do_not_merge_pairs confirm route_b44-local is distinct from both route_b44-sbs and route_b44-limited. The source 201011_nostrand_handout is already listed in route_b44-local source_ids.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ▪ B44 SBS replaces the B44 Limited ▪ B44 local route remains the same

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_b44-limited matches existing registry record route_b44-limited exactly — same service variant (Limited/limited-stop), same corridor (B44 Nostrand Ave, Brooklyn). The do_not_merge_pairs confirm route_b44-limited is distinct from route_b44-sbs (predecessor/replacement) and route_b44-local. The source 201011_nostrand_handout is already listed in route_b44-limited source_ids.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ▪ B44 SBS replaces the B44 Limited

proposed_relations.description: B44 SBS replaced the B44 Limited service on Nostrand/Rogers/Bedford Avenues; the 201011 handout announces this replacement.
